economic_notes: Nation has investments in natural resources, forestry, outfitting, freight services partnerships. Endowment Fund held with Victoria Foundation with initial capital of $13,500,000 from BC Hydro Trust. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact.
notes: Auditor firm name not explicitly stated — identified only as 'Chartered Professional Accountants' based in Prince George, BC. Fiscal year is 2020 not 2024. Accumulated surplus per statement of financial position differs from statement of operations end balance (47,366,177 per operations vs 45,174,282 per Note 17 which includes remeasurement losses of -2,191,895). Long-term debt includes RBC loans totalling $4,233,172 plus FNFA promissory note of $2,362,726. TCA net book value not extractable from truncated Schedule 1. No schedule of remuneration included. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $11,130,886 + FNHA $1,791,107 + Province of BC $1,158,624 + Government of Canada $101,929 + BC Hydro Trust $2,115,066 = $14,297,612 (note: BC Hydro Trust may be investment income not government transfer — included as it is a contribution from BC Power Authority). OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. expenses_enterprises mapped to Own Source segment.
